_doc: Raven Hollow starting-zone new-player flow (BACKLOG #43, design/STARTING_ZONES.md). Per-class starting zone + mentor + a short ORDERED onboarding checklist (move, attack, loot, talk-to-trainer, equip). Consumed by scripts/systems/trainer_system.gd. Every class starts in Raven Hollow (respects the shipped main.gd new-game flow, STARTING_ZONES sec 0/1); the mentor is the class trainer in data/trainers.json. On completion the flow grants a starter reward via LootSystem (gold + one class-identity piece + a come-of-age title). The flow is GUARDED: it only runs for a fresh actor (level 1, no xp, first session).

checklist.text: Find your feet - walk the lanes of Raven Hollow.
Draw steel - strike a training pell or a restless thing.
Take up what the dead leave - open your first spoils.
Seek your mentor - they have work for hands like yours.
Wear the trade - equip a weapon or a piece of armor.

warrior.welcome: The yard behind Goran's still drills at dawn. Codrin asked after anyone wearing a soldier's boots.

rogue.welcome: Ilinca keeps one lamp dark on purpose. She lights it for people worth the shadow.

mage.welcome: The council sealed the candle-house and never quite locked it. Ruxandra is expecting you.

paladin.welcome: Prior Costin polishes a lantern he has never once needed to relight, and checks anyway.

necromancer.welcome: Voicu keeps a ledger of aptitudes. Yours has a page. He has been expecting a client.

rookwarden.welcome: Old Petra's birds have been bragging. She says the rooks chose you at the gallows-tree.

druid.welcome: Baba Iva predates the walls, and the walls do not argue. The wildwood will name its price.
